name: Bottled Medusozoan
description: Notes The Bottled Medusozoan is an interesting alternative to the Assassin’s tiered poisons. It doesn’t give a damage boost, nor does it actually poison enemies. Instead, it lobs a single Cnidarian - a stationary minion that releases short bursts of damage every half-second.

stats.damage: 0, instead tosses a stationary cnidarian that releases bursts of AoE damage

effects: Poison: 2500 damage over 3 seconds within 3.5-4.5 squares Ignores defense of target
